title: Huawei makes 1.4nm chip??
summary: Caleb discusses Huawei's announcement of the Tau Scaling Law as part of the semiconductor race between China and the USA. The video examines how EUV and DUV lithography, chip packaging, and logic folding contribute to advancing semiconductor manufacturing capabilities amid hardware competition.
